<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="sw">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>Nafaka Zetu | Bidhaa Bora za Kilimo</title>

<style>

:root {

--primary: #2e7d32;

--accent: #fbc02d;

--dark: #333;

--light: #f4f4f4;

}



body {

font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;

margin: 0;

padding: 0;

background-color: var(--light);

color: var(--dark);

}



header {

background-color: var(--primary);

color: white;

padding: 2rem 1rem;

text-align: center;

box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);

}



.container {

max-width: 1200px;

margin: auto;

padding: 20px;

}



.hero {

/* Picha ya Shamba */


































background: linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.5), rgba(0,0,0,0.5)), url('1000062111.jpg');

background-size: cover;

background-position: center;

height: 300px;

display: flex;

align-items: center;

justify-content: center;

color: white;

border-radius: 10px;

margin-bottom: 30px;

}



.grid {

display: grid;

grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));

gap: 20px;

}



.card {

background: white;

border-radius: 8px;

overflow: hidden;

box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);

transition: transform 0.3s;

}



.card:hover {

transform: translateY(-5px);

}



.card img {

width: 100%;

height: 250px;

object-fit: cover;

}



.card-content {

padding: 15px;

text-align: center;

}



.card-content h3 {

margin: 0;

color: var(--primary);

}



footer {

background: var(--dark);

color: white;

text-align: center;

padding: 20px 0;

margin-top: 40px;

}



.btn {

display: inline-block;

background: var(--primary);

color: white;

padding: 10px 20px;

text-decoration: none;

border-radius: 5px;

margin-top: 10px;

}

</style>

</head>

<body>



<header>

<h1>NAFAKA ZETU</h1>

<p>Chakula Bora kutoka kwa Mkulima wa Jirani</p>

</header>


























<div class="container">

<div class="hero">

<div style="text-align: center;">

<h2>Tunajali Ubora tangu Shambani</h2>

<p>Mazao yetu yanatunzwa kwa weledi mkubwa.</p>

</div>

</div>



<div class="grid">

<div class="card">

<img src="1000062112.jpg" alt="Unga wa Mahindi">












<div class="card-content">

<h3>Unga wa Mahindi</h3>

<p>Unga bora uliokobolewa na kusagwa katika hali ya usafi.</p>

</div>

</div>



<div class="card">

<img src="1000062113.jpg" alt="Maharage">












<div class="card-content">

<h3>Maharage</h3>

<p>Maharage mekundu yenye ladha halisi, safi na hayana wadudu.</p>

</div>

</div>



<div class="card">

<img src="1000062119.jpg" alt="Mtama">












<div class="card-content">

<h3>Mtama wa Bora</h3>

<p>Lishe bora kwa afya ya familia yako.</p>

</div>

</div>



<div class="card">

<img src="1000062114.jpg" alt="Njegere">












<div class="card-content">

<h3>Njegere Mbichi</h3>

<p>Zimechambuliwa vyema tayari kwa mapishi.</p>

</div>

</div>



<div class="card">

<img src="image_15.png" alt="Ndizi za Kupika">












<div class="card-content">

<h3>Ndizi za Kupika</h3>

<p>Ndizi mbichi na fresh kwa ajili ya mapishi mbalimbali.</p>

</div>

</div>

</div>



<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 50px;">

<h3>Wasiliana Nasi kwa Mahitaji ya Jumla na Reja Reja</h3>

<p>Simu: 0698711607</p>

<a href="https://nafakazetu.com" class="btn">Tembelea Tovuti Yetu</a>

</div>

</div>



<footer>

<p>&copy; 2026 Nafaka Zetu. Haki zote zimehifadhiwa.</p>

</footer>



</body>

</html>
